Home / Services / Stone Masonry

Stone Masonry

Crafting durable and beautiful stone structures that enhance your property's value.

Brick Tech Contracting provides expert stone masonry services for residential and commercial properties in New York. We work with a variety of natural stone materials, including granite, limestone, sandstone, and slate, to create stunning and durable structures. Our stone masonry services include stone veneer installation, retaining walls, walkways, patios, and custom stone features. We understand the unique properties of each type of stone and use appropriate techniques to ensure a long-lasting and aesthetically pleasing result. We work closely with our clients to design and build stone structures that complement their property's style and enhance its overall value. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring precise cuts, proper alignment, and secure bonding. Whether you're looking to add a touch of elegance to your home or create a durable and functional outdoor space, Brick Tech Contracting has the expertise to deliver exceptional stone masonry services. We are familiar with local stone quarries and suppliers, ensuring access to high-quality materials at competitive prices.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation: We discuss your vision and create a custom stone masonry design.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection: We help you choose the perfect stone for your project.
  3. 03 Step 3: Expert Installation: Our skilled masons meticulously install the stone with precision.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches: We complete the project with proper sealing and cleaning.

Benefits

  • Adds elegance and value
  • Creates durable structures
  • Enhances curb appeal
  • Provides a natural aesthetic

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of stone is best for a retaining wall?

Granite and limestone are excellent choices for retaining walls due to their strength, durability, and resistance to weathering. We can help you select the best stone based on your specific needs and budget.

How do you ensure the stone is properly bonded?

We use specialized mortars and adhesives designed for stone masonry. We also ensure proper surface preparation and bonding techniques to create a strong and long-lasting connection.

How do I maintain my stone masonry?

Regular cleaning with a mild detergent and water is typically sufficient. We can also apply protective sealants to prevent staining and water damage.
